GenAiPlugin.description: Proactively creates a Salesforce replenishment order when the shelf audit detects critically missing SKUs. Reduces supply chain friction by automating order creation directly from the audit findings without manual rep intervention.

pluginFunctions.description: Creates a replenishment order in Salesforce for missing SKUs detected during a shelf audit.

parameters.description: The Salesforce ID of the Retail Store
The Salesforce ID of the ShelfAudit__c record
Comma-separated list of Product2 IDs for the missing SKUs that need restocking
